title: Wave 22 - Manager portfolio filter and pagination parity
description: Extend manager portfolio parity with deterministic backend filters and pagination so managers can navigate large inventories without relying on ad-hoc client-side filtering.
acceptance_criteria: Wave plan defines architect/backend/mobile/qa sequencing and rollback checkpoints
Execution plan preserves Docker-only backend policy and AI executor policy
Execution plan includes PR/Jira traceability and merge gating
